specialty.name: Lady Luck
specialty.description:
{Lady Luck}

All creatures in Melodia's army receive +1 Luck. Ordinary Luck penalties cannot reduce her army below +1 Luck, but the Misfortune spell can still overcome this protection, and effects that disable positive Luck can suppress this bonus.
specialty.tooltip: Melodia grants her army +1 Luck and helps maintain at least +1 Luck, unless stronger effects reduce it further.
